description: CompositionBlue and white striped T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, and has the brand logo embroidered on left chest and printed at the nape of the neckFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWith comfort and style rolled into one, this t-shirt from puma is a great addition to your wardrobe. The soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, while the stripes lends it a busy vibe. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6'3”; Shoulders: 19"
